response:
Section 1  
Function processes input data to extract health improvements per age group.  

Section 2  
Each entry in the input has an age group and a list of improvements.  

Section 3  
Count the frequency of each improvement within each age group.  

Section 4  
Identify the improvement with the highest count for every age group.  

Section 5  
Return a dictionary mapping age groups to their most common improvement.  

Section 6  
* Data is grouped by age group.  
* Most frequent item in each group is selected.  

Section 7  
Function ensures accurate summarization of health benefits.
